user.title: Sentinel
user.description: Sentinel will start monitoring your integrations and applications with sensible defaults. You can adjust all settings after setup. To monitor physical devices, use the '+' button on the Sentinel integration page.

data.fire_events: Fire events on the HA bus

data_description.fire_events: Fire a `sentinel_item_changed` event on the HA event bus on every state change. Required for automations.
data_description.grace_period: How long an integration must remain in a failed state before being reported (0 = immediate). Used as the default for all monitored devices.
data_description.enable_device_discovery: When enabled, Sentinel will propose a monitoring flow for each eligible device not yet tracked. You confirm each device individually.
data_description.watch_stopped_addons: When enabled, stopped applications are reported as warnings. By default a stopped application is considered intentional.
data_description.apps_poll_interval: How often Sentinel queries the Supervisor for application states (30–300 seconds, default 60).

user.title: Add device
user.description: Select a physical device to monitor. Sentinel will report it as a problem when any of its entities become unavailable.

data_description.grace_period: Leave empty to use the global grace period defined in Sentinel options.
data_description.note: A free-form note about this device. Not used for monitoring.

data_description.grace_period: Leave empty to use the global grace period defined in Sentinel options.
data_description.ignored: When enabled, this device is excluded from monitoring but kept in the list.
data_description.note: A free-form note about this device.

abort.no_eligible_devices: No eligible devices found. All physical devices with monitored entities are already tracked.
abort.already_configured: This device is already monitored by Sentinel.
